title: Ebon Crispy French Kimchi Souffle
description: A charred, crispy soufflé blending fermented kimchi with French cooking flair, perfect for a sugar-free weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C and grease a 9-inch soufflé dish with olive oil.
In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat and sauté chopped kimchi for 3 minutes until slightly caramelized; set aside.
Separate egg yolks and whites; beat yolks with almond milk, salt, pepper, and thyme until smooth.
Whisk egg whites with a pinch of salt until soft peaks form.
Fold the whisked whites into the yolk mixture gently, then fold in the sautéed kimchi and parmesan cheese.
Pour mixture into the prepared dish and spread evenly.
Bake for 18 minutes or until the surface is puffed and firm.
Reduce heat to 180°C and broil for 1-2 minutes to char the top and develop a crispy crust.
Remove from oven, let rest 2 minutes, then serve immediately with a sprinkle of fresh thyme.
For a sugar-free version, omit papelon or replace it with a natural sweetener.
